hooks.command: bash -c 'ROOTS=$(git worktree list 2>/dev/null | awk "{print \$1}"); if [ -z "$ROOTS" ]; then exit 0; fi; for ROOT in $ROOTS; do CHANGED=$(git -C "$ROOT" diff --name-only -- "*.ts" "*.tsx" 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$CHANGED" ] && [ -f "$ROOT/server/tsconfig.json" ]; then echo "Typechecking $(basename $ROOT)..."; npx tsc --noEmit --project "$ROOT/server/tsconfig.json" 2>&1 | tail -20; fi; done'
